name: Doctor Harley Sawyer
description:
"And to think Playtime had someone of such rare quality and never noticed.."

Before the Hour of Joy, before everything went wrong, working at Playtime was your 9-5. Although there was something about you, a rare quality you kept secret to avoid being turned into a Bigger Body. Keep it a secret, if you can..

New intro added!

(I went feral hearing that line and HAD to make a bot when I saw none for it. Updated after a year or so, idk. Profile Image by: https://www.deviantart.com/bmeplaytime/art/Harley-Sawyer-Character-sheet-P-F-1054230468)
creator: Starry0lights
